title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
